name: Best Ever Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine beef, onions, bell pepper, eggs, grated bun, cottage cheese, salt, ground pepper, milk, and Worcestershire sauce in a 9 by 12 inch baking pan or dish.
3. For topping: Mix together mustard, brown sugar, nutmeg, and ketchup; spread on top of meatloaf.
4. Bake for 1 hour.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
